login.title: Sign In

journal.title: General Journal
journal.subtitle: View and manage general journal entries.

table.emptyHint: Try changing the filter or search keywords.

journal.linesHint: Debit and credit must balance before saving.

new.title: Create Journal
new.subtitle: Create a manual journal draft. Posting is performed from the detail page after review.
new.missingMasterData: Postable accounts or active locations are not ready, or your account does not have accounting access.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.subtitle: Supporting documents and transaction evidence.
attachments.uploadInfo: Upload transaction evidence, photos, or supporting documents directly from this device.

journal.attachmentHint: Use PDF, JPG, or PNG format (max 5MB).

import.title: Import Journal CSV
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV file using the template. Each combination of date, location, description, and reference becomes one draft journal.
import.templateHint: Use account codes from the COA and active location codes. Debit and credit are in Rupiah with no decimals.
import.missingMasterData: Postable accounts or active locations are not ready.

coa.title: Chart of Accounts
coa.subtitle: Browse and manage your chart of accounts hierarchy.
coa.name: Account Name
coa.searchAria: Search by account code or name
coa.emptyHint: Try adjusting your search or filter.

assets.title: Fixed Assets
assets.description: Manage the asset register, depreciation methods, and depreciation journals per location.
assets.registerDescription: Fixed assets are separated per outlet/location so reports and journals stay accurate.
assets.runDescription: The system calculates depreciation for active assets at the selected location, then creates and posts the journal automatically.
assets.createDescription: Register a new asset with its category, useful life, and depreciation method.
assets.name: Asset name
assets.categorySettingsDescription: Set the asset account, accumulated depreciation account, depreciation expense account, default useful life, and default method for each category.
assets.disposeDescription: Record disposal or sale of this asset. A journal entry will be automatically created to remove the asset and accumulated depreciation, and recognize gain/loss.

partyLedger.payablesSubtitle: Payable balances are calculated directly from posted journal lines on selected accounts. Journal changes are reflected here automatically.
partyLedger.receivablesSubtitle: Receivable balances are calculated directly from posted journal lines on selected accounts. Journal changes are reflected here automatically.
partyLedger.accountMappingHelp: Choose accounts treated as operational payables/receivables. Not every liability or current-asset account belongs in this ledger.
partyLedger.ledgerHelp: Aging uses journal posting date when a document due date is not available.
partyLedger.empty: No balances for the selected accounts.
partyLedger.allowanceHelp: The allowance estimate is calculated from net receivable aging based on due dates. Rates use basis points, e.g. 100 = 1%.

pettyCash.title: Petty Cash
pettyCash.subtitle: Monitor petty cash balance per location and transaction history. Each outlet can have a different limit & opening balance.
pettyCash.noAccounts: No active outlets. Add an outlet in Settings → Locations first.
pettyCash.openInfo: When opened, the system automatically records a DR Petty Cash · CR Cash journal.
pettyCash.modalTopupInfo: Automatic journal: DR Petty Cash · CR Cash
pettyCash.modalDepositInfo: Automatic journal: DR Bank · CR Petty Cash

errors.balanceExceedsPlafond: Opening balance cannot exceed the limit.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create petty cash account.
errors.accountAlreadyExists: Petty cash for this outlet has already been opened.
errors.accountsMissing: Cash / petty cash accounts are incomplete in COA or outlet POS settings.
errors.openingExceedsLimit: Opening balance cannot exceed the limit.
errors.exceedsMaxLimit: Petty cash balance would exceed the limit.
errors.validationFailed: Please check the amount and outlet.
errors.unauthenticated: Your login session has expired. Please sign in again.

bankRecon.title: Bank Reconciliation
bankRecon.subtitle: Import bank statements from CSV and match with posted journals. Reconciliation is manual.
bankRecon.deleteConfirm: Delete this statement? All lines and matches will be removed.

import.title: Import Bank Statement
import.subtitle: Upload bank statement CSV, or use manual input to add lines one by one.
import.missingMasterData: Active bank account or location is unavailable.
import.templateHint: CSV format: Date (YYYY-MM-DD), Description, Debit, Credit, Balance. Comma separated.
import.pdfHint: Bank statements are usually in PDF format. You can copy the data into the CSV template or input it manually.
import.manualSubtitle: Add bank statement lines one by one. Useful for copying from PDF bank statements.
import.noLines: No lines yet. Click "+ Add Line" to start.

detail.allMatched: All lines matched. Click "Finalize Reconciliation" to close.
detail.journalCreated: Journal created and line matched successfully.

journals.attachmentHint: Upload transaction proof or supporting documents. The file will be automatically attached once the draft journal is successfully created. Maximum 10 MB per file.

new.subtitle: Create a new Sales or Purchase Invoice

postAction.title: Post Invoice
postAction.subtitle: Review and select the Partner (AR/AP) account before posting.
postAction.receivableDesc: Select the account to map the total receivable balance for this invoice in the resulting journal entry.
postAction.payableDesc: Select the account to map the total payable balance for this invoice in the resulting journal entry.

invoice.amountExceeds: Amount to pay exceeds remaining balance

purchasing.title: Purchasing
purchasing.subtitle: Manage suppliers and purchase orders from the ERP.
purchasing.dashboardSubtitle: Manage suppliers, purchase orders, PO payables, and shipment tracking. Goods receipt still uses GRN so stock and journals stay traceable.
purchasing.addSupplierHelp: Suppliers are used when creating purchase orders and recording purchases.

grn.grnFormSubtitle: Receive items from this purchase order to add to stock.
grn.fullyReceived: All items for this PO have been fully received.

purchasing.emptyFilter: No purchase orders match the filter.
purchasing.itemsHint: Products shown here have purchasable status.

new.title: Create Purchase Order
new.subtitle: Create a PO from an active supplier. Once approved, goods receipt is recorded through GRN so inventory and journals remain consistent.
new.missingMasterData: Suppliers, active locations, or purchasable products are not ready. Complete those records before creating a PO.

returns.title: Purchase Returns
returns.description: Record goods returned to a supplier after GRN (broken / expired / wrong delivery).
returns.newReturnDesc: Pick a source GRN, choose which lines to return, then submit for approval.
returns.terminalState: Return is in a terminal state. No further actions.

shipments.title: Supplier Shipments
shipments.subtitle: Track inbound deliveries from suppliers via BinderByte (JNE, J&T, SiCepat, etc.).
shipments.searchPlaceholder: Search PO no. / supplier / location / AWB
shipments.emptyAll: No POs with shipment data yet.
shipments.emptyFilter: No shipments match the current filter.
shipments.errorsBanner: {count} shipments errored on the last sync. Check AWB number and courier code.

detail.title: Shipment Detail
detail.syncHint: Press the button to pull the latest status from BinderByte. Each sync consumes 1 monthly quota.
detail.historyEmpty: No history yet. Run a sync to fetch data from the courier.

copy.subtitle: Manage background jobs such as backup, stock alerts, payroll, and site cache. Worker picks up changes automatically.
copy.howItWorksBody: The worker reads schedules from the database every 60 seconds. Toggle jobs or edit cron from this page. Cron format:

backup.label: Database Backup
backup.description: Daily database backup to off-site storage (S3/R2)

payrollBatch.label: Monthly Payroll Processing
payrollBatch.description: Calculate and process payroll on the 8th of each month

stockLowAlert.label: Low Stock Alert
stockLowAlert.description: Weekly stock level check every Monday morning

isrRevalidate.label: Cache Revalidation
isrRevalidate.description: Revalidate public page cache each morning

partyLedgerReminders.label: Payable/Receivable Reminders
partyLedgerReminders.description: Send due-date notifications based on reminder days set on journal lines

aiActionDraftsSweeper.label: AI Action Draft Cleanup
aiActionDraftsSweeper.description: Delete expired AI action drafts so the confirmation queue stays clean

empty.title: No scheduled jobs
empty.body: Schedules are created through seed data or this settings page.

errors.qtyPositive: Qty must be a positive number.

products.suppliesEmpty: No raw materials or supplies found.
products.variantDesc: Use for Regular/Large and Hot/Cold. Variant prices are used by POS when available.

products.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this product? Only products that have never been sold, used, purchased, stocked, or recorded in transactions can be deleted.

transfer.errorSameLocation: Source and destination locations cannot be the same

opnameDetail.uncountedInfo: {count} lines uncounted. Fill in "Counted" column then click "Save".
opnameDetail.allCountedInfo: All lines counted. Click "Submit Opname" to calculate variance.
opnameDetail.varianceInfoSuffix: After approval, an adjustment journal is created automatically — shortage: DR Opex / CR Inventory; surplus: DR Inventory / CR Other Income.

inventory.sellableDescriptionPrefix: Manage sellable items (menu items) for customers. Each item must have a

pos.title: Point of Sale

orders.title: Order History
orders.subtitle: List of sales transactions for this location. Click a row to view details and, if permitted, void or refund.
orders.unauthenticated: Session is not authenticated or default location is not set in your profile.
orders.empty: No orders found for this date.

errors.noLocation: You don't have a POS location set for this session.
errors.selectOneItem: Select at least one item to refund.

orders.selectOrderHint: Select an order in the table to view details.

modal.voidHint: Only open orders can be voided.
modal.refundHint: Only paid orders can be refunded.
modal.voidDesc: Voiding can only be done on open orders — it will not reverse journals because it hasn't been posted yet.
modal.refundDesc: Refund reverses the original journal, returns raw material stock, and marks the order as refunded.
modal.reasonPlaceholderRefund: e.g. spilled drink, wrong product, etc.
modal.reasonHint: Reason will be saved in the audit log and cannot be changed.

manualSales.title: Manual Sales Entry
manualSales.subtitle: Use this while an outlet still runs the old POS. Cashiers enter the daily closing total; the system posts the journal from POS Settings accounts.
manualSales.posted: Manual closing has been posted and synced to the journal.

pos.expenseHint: Use this form to record drawer cash expenses, e.g. buying water/supplies. This will reduce your Expected Cash.
pos.manualDiscountReasonRequired: A reason is required for manual discounts.
pos.nonCashOverpay: Non-cash payments must match the amount due. Use cash when change is needed.
pos.memberNotFound: Member not found. Continue as walk-in or register a new member.

pos.confirmVoid: Are you sure you want to void this order?
pos.shiftAlreadyOpen: Shift is already open at this location
pos.customDonationHint: Type the amount the customer wants to donate. The remaining change is given in cash.

demo.snapshotHelp: Make sure production POS has been opened on this browser before. Products, prices, and modifiers must be saved in browser IndexedDB.

messages.geolocationUnsupported: This browser does not support geolocation.

locations.subtitle: Manage outlets, internal offices, warehouses, addresses, active status, currency, and timezone from the ERP.

editor.title: Edit ERP Docs
editor.subtitle: Update guides, tutorials, and work instructions from the UI. Saved changes become the Docs page content immediately.

editor.forbidden: This account cannot edit the guide.
